TextENGNew: "All right.@k@vS14/01/210100256. ...I'm heading out, Mom!"
"Oh, Keiichi, wait a moment.@k@vS14/00/212700002. ...Nngh."

I was slipping on my shoes at the front door and had just opened it when Mom called me back. Wondering what was up, I turned around to find her hauling a massive bag of rice out of the kitchen with a strained heave.
"...Uh, what's that?"
"A bag of rice. Can't you tell by looking?"
No, that's not what I was asking...
"Even if it's your celebration, you can't just show up empty-handed when someone invites you, right?@k@vS14/00/212700005. So take this along."
"H-hang on, 'this' is...@k@vS14/01/210100259. Whoa?!"
Without giving me a chance to object, Mom shoved the rice bag into my arms. I caught it reflexively against my chest, but it was so unexpected that I nearly pitched forward.
H-heavy... What is this thing? It's stuffed to bursting!
"H-how am I supposed to carry this?@k@vS14/01/210100261. I'm on my bike, you know?!"
"You'll be fine -- it'll fit right in your basket, won't it?@k@vS14/00/212700007. Oh, and I triple-bagged it, so don't worry about it tearing."
...Um, I feel like she's worrying about the wrong thing here. Is it just me?
"Come on now, straighten up! Stand tall!@k@vS14/00/212700009. You're the class rep, aren't you?"
"Oof?!"
*Thwack!* She slapped my back with gusto, and I nearly choked. I was about to shoot her a dirty look and say something, but the beaming smile on her face made the words die in my throat.
"...Haah. Well, I'm off."
"Watch out for cars~."
Then don't make me haul this ridiculously heavy thing on a bike!!
I grumbled to myself about that... but seeing Mom so genuinely happy, I figured I could let it slide.
Come to think of it, this was the first time I'd ever been elected to a position of trust by my peers. Mom probably had plenty of feelings of her own about that.
...Thanks, Mom.
The summer sun blazed brightly in a cloudless ultramarine sky.
I pedaled hard, carefully gripping the handlebars to keep the cargo in my front basket from throwing off my balance.
Sweat clung to my forehead. The unpaved footpath between the rice paddies was studded with exposed pebbles, and even riding in a straight line made the bike shudder and rattle.
Today was Sunday.
Mion had proposed that we hold a celebration at the Furude Shrine grounds to mark my inauguration as class rep.

The attendees would be the full club roster, including all the new members -- meaning the entire class. And thanks to Mion pulling strings, the Sonozaki family was generously providing meat, fish, and more.
Well, since this was a school-related event and Chie-sensei and the principal would be present, I had to wear my uniform. A little stiff, but I could live with it.
"Keiichi-ku~n!"
As expected, Rena and Mion were already waiting at our usual meeting spot.
"You're late, Kei-chan!@k@vS14/03/210300264. Shouldn't the class rep be the first one there, waiting for everyone~?"
"...And were you, when you were class rep?"
"Never look back.@k@vS14/03/210300266. Keep your eyes forward. Forward."
She always has a comeback ready. ...Well, I had a feeling the 'class rep' jokes were going to follow me around for a while.
"Huh? Kei-chan, what's that bag in your basket?@k@vS14/03/210300268. ...Wait, is that rice?"
"Wow... 'Premium Domestic Rice'?@k@vS14/02/210200117. ...And so much of it! Amazing!"
"Don't... Don't ask..."
It was too annoying to explain. ...And I couldn't exactly badmouth the gift if I wanted to save Mom's face.

"Aahahaha!@k@vS14/03/210300270. Kei-chan, you really didn't have to!@k@vS14/03/210300271. You're the guest of honor, you know.@k@vS14/03/210300272. Besides, we've already prepared plenty of rice. It's fine!"
"No, that's not what I..."
"Well, whatever.@k@vS14/03/210300274. Come on, let's get going!@k@vS14/03/210300275. Everyone's waiting!"
"Yeah! Let's feast and drink our fill!"
"Ahahahaha!@k@vS14/02/210200119. A big barbecue with everyone sounds so fun!@k@vS14/02/210200120. I'm so excited~!"
Chattering and laughing like that, the three of us rode our bikes to Furude Shrine.
It had been a while since I'd last visited -- not since Rena and Mion took me on that tour of Hinamizawa.

The shrine grounds were spacious, with that tranquil atmosphere unique to shrines. And above all, the view from the hilltop was breathtakingly beautiful. A perfect spot for a rowdy gathering with the whole class.
We parked our bikes beside the stone steps leading up. Given that the entire class was here, there were quite a few bicycles and even some cars.
...Wait. Cars?
"Mion, are parents coming to today's party too?"
"Yeah.@k@vS14/03/210300277. A barbecue means open flames, so it'd be trouble without some adults supervising, right?@k@vS14/03/210300278. So I asked old man Kimiyoshi to round up some helpers."
"Old man Kimiyoshi... You mean the village chief?@k@vS14/01/210100270. Wow..."
To think she could get the village chief to mobilize adults on her behalf... That's the Sonozaki heir for you.
...Could I really fill Mion's shoes? There was a massive gap between us when it came to connections and everything else.
"Aahahaha!@k@vS14/03/210300280. You'll be fine, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/03/210300281. Maybe not right away, but give it a few years and I bet people will come running at a single word from you!"
Just as I was starting to brood, Mion gave me a series of rough pats on the back and laughed brightly, as if she'd read my mind.
...Well, fair enough. My time as class rep was just beginning. I'd build my own style from here.
Even from the stone steps, I could hear a clamor of voices rising from the shrine grounds above. Children's cheers were mixed with the hearty laughter of adults -- it sounded incredibly lively.
"Oh, it sounds like it's already started?@k@vS14/02/210200122. We need to hurry!"
"Already started? Huh...?@k@vS14/03/210300283. They promised to wait until the guest of honor arrived..."
"M-M-M-M-Mion-san!!"
Just then, Satoko and Rika-chan -- who had apparently arrived ahead of us -- came rushing down the stone steps, waving frantically.
"Oh, hey Satoko.@k@vS14/01/210100272. Early as always~."
"Sorry we're late.@k@vS14/03/210300285. Kei-chan held us up~..."
"Th-th-th-that's not important right now!"
"...Something absolutely astounding has happened."
Cutting off Mion's greeting, Satoko and Rika-chan rushed up to her with panicked, flustered expressions.
"Wh-what's wrong, you two?@k@vS14/03/210300287. Did something happen?"
"I-I'd like to gift-wrap that question with a ribbon and noshi paper and return it right to you!"
"Satoko... a ribbon and noshi paper? That's a bit of an East-meets-West clash, don't you think?"
"That's right, Satoko-chan?@k@vS14/02/210200124. If you're using noshi paper, you tie it with a mizuhiki cord, not a ribbon --"
"Why are you calmly discussing gift-wrapping etiquette?!@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1030. This is not the time for that!!"
Wait, wasn't Satoko the one who brought up noshi paper...?
"A-anyway!@k@vS14/04/210400200. Mion-san, please come quickly!!"
"Huh? W-wait?!@k@vS14/03/210300289. D-don't pull so hard --"
"...Keiichi, you need to come too."
"Huh? Me too?"
"If you don't come now, I think you'll regret it for the rest of your life."
Rika-chan delivered that ominous line with her usual 'Nipah~' smile.
After a warning like that, I could hardly refuse. Rena and I exchanged a glance and followed Rika-chan up the stone steps.
And then...
"Wh-what is going on here? Going on?"
Rena and I stood frozen, gaping at the scene before us.
All I could see was people, people, people, people, people, people, people -- people??!!
The kids from our class were all there, of course, but the sheer number of adults was overwhelming.
And there were swarms of other kids with familiar faces, too. ...Wait -- were those Angel Mort waitresses helping with the barbecue?!
If that was the case, then could it be...?
"Ohhhh! K!!@k@vS14/23/212800002. Long time no see!!!"
"K-Kameda...kun?!"
The person already raiding the dessert table before the main course had even started was unmistakably that eccentric pitcher -- I mean, Kameda-kun.
Which meant... the kids gathered around him were from the Okinomiya Titans?
"Wh-what are you doing here, Kameda-kun?"
"Wellll, I heard from the Fighters that there was a party for you today~.@k@vS14/23/212800004. As your soul brother, I felt duty-bound to attend with the whole squad!!"
"...Is that really the only reason?"

"Well, actually, today was supposed to be the Dessert Fest, but the owner suddenly cancelled it to help with this party~.@k@vS14/23/212800006. I screamed, cried, threw a tantrum, and begged on my knees!!"
"...You're not even embarrassed to admit that?"
"But then the owner arranged to move the festival here!@k@vS14/00/otaA10002. As expected of the great boss from our spiritual hometown!"

"Nyorin~!@k@vS14/00/otaB10002. Normally, gazing at them inside that adorable restaurant while panting is deliciously taboo, nyah, but seeing them outdoors in the bright sunlight is a rare treat of its own, nyah!!"
"What's more, eating cake with this kind of scenery is truly special!@k@vS14/00/otaC10002. ...Oh, and don't worry.@k@vS14/00/otaC10003. We'll take all our trash with us when we leave!"
"Gentle on nature, strict with ourselves!@k@vS14/00/otaD10002. That is the noblesse oblige of those who have pledged their souls to Angel Mort!"

Kameda-kun and his crew puffed out their chests proudly. ...Though it was hard to take them seriously with cream smeared all over their mouths. If anything, it looked like they'd latched onto the event just to devour cakes -- or ogle the girls. Mostly the former. ...No, both.
...More importantly, did these blacklisters have any awareness of how out of place they looked, and how much their presence spoiled the scenery?!
"The shrine is a public space.@k@vS14/05/210500192. So it's everyone's garden."
"...Are you really okay with that, Rika-chan?"
"...But there are certain people I do wish would show restraint... Mii."
changeReason: Changes Rika's catchphrase rendering from 'Meep' to 'Mii' (みぃ).

TextENGNew: "Anyway, Kei-chan... 'soul brother'...?"
"...That exists solely in his mind. A phantom born of delusion.@k@vS14/01/210100282. Such a friend does not exist in my world."
"...And yet there he is, right over there."
Please... someone just delete this reality...
"Even so, what a staggering number of people.@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1032. It looks like more than half the village has gathered here."
"...It's like a mini Watanagashi Festival."
Rika-chan likened it to the upcoming annual village festival. Surely that was an exaggeration... but the sheer number of people filling the grounds made it hard to dismiss.
"It's not just out here.@k@vS14/05/210500196. The assembly hall is packed with adults from Hinamizawa too."
"R-really?!"
""Gwa ha ha ha!!!""
As if to prove her point, boisterous laughter kept erupting from the prefabricated building a short distance away.
...And it definitely wasn't my imagination that I could smell alcohol and appetizers wafting over.
For now, the adult zone, the kids' zone, and... the dark zone were clearly separated. But at this rate, those walls wouldn't hold for long.
"H-hey, Mion!@k@vS14/01/210100284. Don't you think this is way too many people?"

"Aahahaha!@k@vS14/03/210300294. You're so naive, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/03/210300295. The class rep hasn't changed even once since I started school!@k@vS14/03/210300296. So a celebration on this scale is perfectly justified!"
"R... really?"
"...Is what I'd like to say...@k@vS14/03/210300298. But yeah, this is definitely weird..."
Even Mion couldn't just laugh it off any longer. She clutched her head and sank into thought with a troubled groan.
"How strange...@k@vS14/03/210300300. I only asked old man Kimiyoshi to gather a few adults to help with the barbecue..."
"Kimiyoshi is here too. Look."
"Oh~, Mion-chan!@k@vS14/18/213300003. Finally decided to grace us with your presence?"
Just then, a dignified old man emerged from the assembly hall and walked over to Mion with a broad smile.
His face was beet red, and his breath carried a distinct whiff of alcohol. He had clearly been drinking for some time.
"K-Kimiyoshi...?"
"Sorry about that~, we started without you.@k@vS14/18/213300005. The town council boys kept hounding me to pour the drinks."
...His speech was already slurring. Was this man really the famously tough-as-nails village chief of Hinamizawa? Seriously??
"Ohhh!@k@vS14/18/213300007. So this must be the young man Mion-chan has her heart set on!"
"Oh, h-hello...@k@vS14/01/210100286. Heart set on?"

"My, my! Just as I'd expect from someone Mion-chan has her eye on -- what a fine-looking young man!@k@vS14/18/213300009. I bet he'll grow into an even greater man than Mion-chan's father!!@k@vS14/18/213300010. We're counting on you, Keiichi Maebara-kun!!"
"Ah, n-nice to meet..."
"Ow ow ow ow?!"
Before I could finish, the village chief seized my hand and squeezed with all his might. I thought my hand was going to be crushed.
Anyway... 'heart set on'? Didn't that man just say something concerning?
"Uh, um... what did you mean by 'heart set on'?"
"Oh, come now!@k@vS14/18/213300012. No need to be shy, Maebara-kun!@k@vS14/18/213300013. The whole village already knows you're Mion-chan's sweetheart, you know?"
"H-huuuh?!"
"W-w-wait a minute!@k@vS14/03/210300303. K-Kei-chan and I aren't like that!"
"I know, I know!@k@vS14/18/213300015. You don't have to say a word -- I comple~etely understand you, Mion-chan."
"B-but... it's not like that...!!"
Mion's face was crimson as she desperately denied it, but the village chief just kept cheerfully repeating 'I understand.' ...And the more I looked at his face, the more uneasy I became.
This guy definitely did NOT understand. Don't you all agree?
"A-anyway!@k@vS14/03/210300306. What's with all this commotion?!"
"What do you mean...?"
"I-I did ask for some adults to help with Kei-chan's celebration...@k@vS14/03/210300308. But I never told you to rally the whole village into a massive spectacle, did I?"
Still burning with embarrassment over the 'heart set on' remark, Mion's flushed face took on an edge of anger as she pressed him. But the village chief just smiled serenely and answered breezily.
"Well of course! Today is a joyous occasion, after all!@k@vS14/18/213300018. For you, Mion-chan."
"Huh? What are you talking about?@k@vS14/03/210300310. The celebration isn't for me -- it's for Kei-chan..."
"Isn't it the same thing~?@k@vS14/18/213300020. Today, we're celebrating Mion-chan finding her future husband!"
The sheer volume of the scream that followed --
-- sent a flock of birds perched on the shrine roof scattering into the sky all at once.
Aah, those white birds looked so beautiful against the blue sky... No, that's not the point!!
"That would mean --"
"H-h-h-h-h-h-hus-hus-husband?!@k@vS14/02/210200129. Wh-wh-wh-wh-where did this come from??!!"
"Oh? Am I mistaken?@k@vS14/18/213300022. Didn't he propose to you, Mion-chan?"
This time even Satoko, who had missed the previous collective scream, joined in. The resulting shriek echoed across the grounds.
"M-M-M-M-M-M-M-M-Mii-chan?!@k@vS14/02/210200132. Wh-wh-wh-what does this mean?!"
"I-I-I-I-I-I don't know! I have no idea!!"
"There's no way you don't know!@k@vS14/02/210200134. When did you and Keiichi-kun make some kind of promise like that?!?!"
Rena grabbed Mion by the collar with terrifying intensity. Mion tried to shake her head no, but Rena wasn't having it -- she shook Mion back and forth violently, forcing her head to nod up and down.
*shake shake shake shake shake shake shake shake*
"Abba, abbabbabbabbabba?!@k@vS14/03/210300315. Abbabbabbabbabbabba!?!"
"M-Mii-chan!@k@vS14/02/210200136. Say something!!@k@vS14/02/210200137. I can't understand you if you stay silent!!!"
Mion's semicircular canals were being rattled with enough force to make a veteran fighter pilot pass out with a nosebleed. The whites of her eyes were starting to show.
But Rena's sonic boom paid that no mind whatsoever and only gained momentum!!
*shake shake shake shake shake shake shake shake*
"Ah, abba?! Abbabbabbabbabba!?!@k@vS14/03/210300317. ...Abba... haurgh...!?!"
Wait -- I shouldn't just be standing here watching!!
"C-calm down, Rena?!@k@vS14/01/210100294. She can't talk even if she wanted to! She can't even breathe!!"
"Rena, stop!@k@vS14/05/210500202. Mii is on the verge of an out-of-body experience!"
*fling* --
"-- bwuhergh?!"

Rena snapped back to her senses and let go, but the momentum sent Mion sailing into the shrine's hedgerow. With a delightful little shriek, she plunged in headfirst, leaving only her legs sticking straight up in the air. Total defeat.
"...How unsightly."
"...Divine retribution.@k@vS14/05/210500204. May she rest in peace. Namu~."
"Don't just declare me dead!!@k@vS14/03/210300320. ...Haah, haah...!"
Mion Sonozaki, resurrected.
Munching on the leaves that had gotten into her mouth during the crash landing, Mion dragged herself out of the bushes, gasped for air, and slowly staggered upright. ...Is that grass even edible?
"H-hau~...@k@vS14/02/210200140. Sorry, Mii-chan...@k@vS14/02/210200141. I just didn't know what kind of face to make..."
"...For starters, could you at least stop laughing...?"
"A-anyway, I had no idea...!@k@vS14/04/210400208. That such a monumental operation was being conducted behind the scenes!"
"Keiichi and Mii, you're both so secretive.@k@vS14/05/210500206. I wish you would have at least confided in us."
"I-I don't know anything about this! It's news to me!@k@vS14/01/210100296. R-right, Mion?!"
"M-m-m-m-m-me, m-m-me too!@k@vS14/03/210300323. I never said anything like that!?!"
Mion shook her head furiously, her face burning red. But the village chief just tilted his head with a puzzled expression. Judging from his demeanor, it was hard to write this off as a drunken joke.
"...First of all, Mion-san.@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1034. How exactly did you explain this party to the village chief?"
"W-well, I just..."
"Just try to remember.@k@vS14/01/210100298. And recite it word for word."
"Uh, um..."
"Hey, Kimiyoshi!@k@vS14/03/210300327. We're planning a barbecue party this Sunday with everyone. Would you help out?"
"A party?@k@vS14/18/213300024. ...Sure, I don't mind, but what's the occasion?"
"Yeah! I finally... I finally found him!@k@vS14/03/210300329. A boy I can entrust everything to!"
Everyone stood frozen, their eyes like dots. I couldn't see my own face, but I was probably making the exact same expression.
"W...was that weird?@k@vS14/03/210300331. Did I phrase it wrong?"
"W-well, I mean...@k@vS14/04/210400212. Your intention wasn't wrong, per se..."
"Depending on how you hear it, that phrasing could lead to a massive misunderstanding."
"Y-you really can't read a room... Mii-chan. Hau~."
...Indeed, her words had been recklessly ambiguous.
If you polled everyone on whether those words meant 'class rep' or 'fiance,' I wonder what the results would show.
An overwhelming majority, no doubt. ...In the interpretation most mortifying for me.

"And then everyone on the town council started saying, 'The engagement of the next Sonozaki family head -- we can't let that go uncelebrated!'@k@vS14/18/213300026. And of course, as one of the Three Families..."
"W-w-w-wait a minute!@k@vS14/03/210300333. I-if this gets back to G-Granny...!!"
"Hmm? Oryou-san already knows."
"Huuuuh?!"

"She said to bring the two of you over sometime.@k@vS14/18/213300029. 'I'll greet him with my Japanese sword,' she said. Ahaha!@k@vS14/18/213300030. But for all her bluster, she was in an awfully good mood!"
"Ngh?!"
Mion's jaw dropped so far it looked like it had come unhinged.
...Wait, so they went ahead and gave their blessing without even consulting us?! And what's this about a Japanese sword?! Am I going to get cut to pieces just for paying a visit?!

"After all, Maebara-kun is now the most famous person in the village!@k@vS14/18/213300032. I hear you're doing all sorts of things at the upcoming festival, too!@k@vS14/18/213300033. I'm looking forward to it!!"
"H-hah...@k@vS14/01/210100300. I-isn't this all getting a bit, um, ahead of itself...?"

"Well sure, a few people did say it seemed awfully hasty.@k@vS14/18/213300035. But when someone pointed out that this sort of thing is normal for kids these days, everyone agreed and that settled it."
Hold on... no matter how fast the times change, moral standards don't shift THAT drastically, do they?!
And only a 'few' were opposed? What do you mean 'a few'?! I'm seriously questioning the common sense of every adult in this village!!

"Besides, a joyous occasion like this calls for the whole village to come together and celebrate!@k@vS14/18/213300037. Make us proud, Maebara-kun!@k@vS14/18/213300038. The Hinamizawa town council is behind you!"
"...Ha, haha..."
All I could do was laugh.
...How did our village end up like this...?
"M-Mion... say something, would you --@k@vS14/01/210100303. Wha?!"
"Poke, poke."
"...She's been knocked out on her feet."
"M-Mii-chan..."
H-hey, Miooon!! You're the one who caused this mess -- you can't just pass out on us!!
"...Oh, Kimiyoshi.@k@vS14/06/210600192. Makino-san is calling for you over there --"
"Huh?"
And then, of all the people I least wanted to see in this chaos... Shion arrived.
Sure enough, the moment Shion saw our faces from behind the village chief's blind spot, she flashed a wicked grin. And then --
"Good afternoon, dear brother-in-law.@k@vS14/06/210600195. How are we doing today~?"
"Sh-Shion, you little...!!"
"Oh~? Am I wrong?@k@vS14/06/210600197. If you're Sis's husband, that would make you my brother-in-law, wouldn't it?@k@vS14/06/210600198. ...Hehehe!"

Hearing Shion's voice finally snapped Mion back to consciousness. Shion was cackling with the most entertained expression imaginable, and Mion, on the verge of tears, clung to her desperately as the village chief walked away.
"Sh-Shion!@k@vS14/03/210300339. Tell them! Tell everyone!@k@vS14/03/210300340. This is a misunderstanding! A mistake!!@k@vS14/03/210300341. Everyone's got the completely wrong idea!!!"
"Oh? Is that so?"
"O-of course it is!@k@vS14/03/210300343. You know perfectly well!!"
"That's strange~.@k@vS14/06/210600201. When you were planning this party, you were gushing about Kei-chan and shooting off lovey-dovey rays at full blast..."
"L-lovey-dovey...?"

"W-waaaaah?!@k@vS14/03/210300345. N-no no no no. Nooo!!@k@vS14/03/210300346. I-I told you, if you ever breathed a word of that I'd never speak to you again!@k@vS14/03/210300347. I'm going to seriously punch you!?!"
"Oh my~?@k@vS14/06/210600203. Is that any way to ask someone for a favor?@k@vS14/06/210600204. I'm a little hurt, you know~."
"Ngh?@k@vS14/03/210300349. ...P-please, Shion-sama...@k@vS14/03/210300350. I-I humbly apologize for my rudeness, s-so please, could you explain to everyone that this is all a misunderstanding...?"
"What's the big deal, as long as everyone's having fun?"
"Y-you're the only ones having fun here!!!"
Her usual composure long gone, Mion was in full panic mode, her face as red as a boiled octopus, simultaneously groveling before and threatening Shion.
...What kind of posture even is that? But Shion maintained her cool, tilting her head with a deliberately exaggerated look of concern.
"Well... I'll try, I suppose.@k@vS14/06/210600207. But it's probably too late already."
"Huh?"
"What topic do you think they're all getting excited about in the assembly hall right now?@k@vS14/06/210600209. Whether the next heir will be a boy or a girl, and who gets to name the baby."
"N-next heiiiiir!?!"
Wait wait wait, WAIT!! One misunderstanding was bad enough, but now they'd warped into some far-future fantasy!! We're still kids!!
"K-Keiichi-kun and Mii-chan's... baby...@k@vS14/02/210200145. H-hauuuu~, k-kyuuuuute, so kyuuute...!"
"B...but something about it makes me feel weird for some reason...?@k@vS14/02/VT4Ba_rena1002. But still, it'd be kyuuute, so I wanna take it hooooome!"
"G-gaaaaah?!@k@vS14/04/210400214. R-Rena-san, my neck! You're strangling me!!@k@vS14/04/210400215. R-rope break! Break!@k@vS14/04/210400216. Stop the maaatch~~~!?!"
Beside us, Rena had apparently slipped into some outrageous fantasy and had locked Satoko -- stand-in baby -- in a death grip with both arms.
...I could see Satoko's face gradually shifting from red to blue, but she'd probably be fine. It's Satoko, after all.
"Hehehe...@k@vS14/06/210600211. Well, don't worry too much.@k@vS14/06/210600212. Everyone is only half-joking."
"That means they're half-serious!!"
That's not a consolation at all!
"Oh, also...@k@vS14/06/210600214. Mom and Dad should be arriving soon, you know?@k@vS14/06/210600215. To get a look at the groom."
"Th-the groom...?@k@vS14/01/210100309. Wait -- you mean me?!"

"They want to inspect you personally.@k@vS14/06/210600217. Oh, be careful, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/06/210600218. Our father is the head of the Sonozaki Group, you know.@k@vS14/06/210600219. Good luck out there~."
"Are you cheering me on or threatening me?! Which is it!!"
And what does she mean, 'inspect'?! Am I a criminal on the run or something?!
"Don't worry, Kei-chan!@k@vS14/06/210600221. I gave our parents a very thorough explanation about the two of you.@k@vS14/06/210600222. Very. Thorough."
Wh-what exactly did you tell them?! ...But one look at Shion's face made the answer obvious. As proof, Mion had gone completely white, burned out as though witnessing the apocalypse.
"Y...you.@k@vS14/03/210300354. What have you done...?!"
"You brought this on yourself.@k@vS14/06/210600224. Consider it divine retribution for nearly killing me in that curry incident."
Y-you're still hung up on that?!

"Of course I am.@k@vS14/06/210600226. ...Rather than being called a woman who cuts clean like split bamboo, I'd rather be known as one who pounds grudges like mochi rice!@k@vS14/06/210600227. That's me -- Shion Sonozaki!!"
"...Saying that about yourself really undermines the point."
"Besides, a story this hilarious can't just be squashed.@k@vS14/06/210600229. Why settle for putting out the fire when you can douse it in gasoline and turn it into a blazing inferno?"
A demon... she's a demon... Is there no one who can stop this runaway train?!
"K-Kei-chan!@k@vS14/03/210300356. Let's run!!"
"H-huuuh?!"
"Don't 'huuuh' me -- do you not grasp the situation?!@k@vS14/03/210300358. If we stay, they'll use us as drinking entertainment all day and by tomorrow we'll be an officially recognized couple!"
O-officially...?
W-well... if it were Mion, maybe that wouldn't be so bad... or so I thought for just a fleeting moment...
N-no, no! What am I thinking?!
"-- Kei-chan!!"
"Huh?@k@vS14/01/210100313. Y-yeah! Right!@k@vS14/01/210100314. Sorry, Rena -- today's party is postponed!"
"H-huuuh?!"
Finally released from Rena's hold, Satoko collapsed spread-eagle on the ground, her eyes spinning.
Rika-chan was poking her with a twig to check if she was still alive... but right now, I had to secure my own safety first! Sorry, Satoko!
"Let's go, Mion!"
"Yeah, let's go!"
Mion had turned to face me as she broke into a sprint and ran headlong into a woman standing directly in her path.
Mion bounced off and landed hard on the ground, but the kimono-clad woman merely wobbled slightly and held her footing.
"S-sorry!"
"Oh, not at all.@k@vS14/16/212200002. ...Restless as ever, I see."
Something about her unmistakable, distinctive accent made me instinctively stiffen and look up at her.
Narrow, elegant eyes. A refined face. And a smile that... reminded me of someone.
N-no way...?
"M-Mion...?"
"~~~~!! (a silent shriek)"
Looking up from the ground, Mion's face had frozen into something resembling The Scream. ...Or maybe one of those haniwa clay figures?
I timidly glanced back at Shion and the others. Shion was shaking her head as if to say 'give up,' and Rika-chan was... pressing her palms together in prayer?!
"So you're Maebara-kun?@k@vS14/16/212200004. I'm Mion's mother -- Akane Sonozaki!@k@vS14/16/212200004_005. Feel free to start calling me Mom~!"
...And so.
At that moment, I was made to realize that what could have been the *best* day of my life had already, without question, become the *worst*.
